title: Calender view for 'My Work' with the ability to add items
excerpt:
We like the ‘My Work’ view for managing our projects. Very clear and straightforward. However, right now we have to select our project boards one by one when adding items/tasks to them, which is inefficient.

posts.author: Teun (Teun)
posts.cookedHtml:
We like the ‘My Work’ view for managing our projects. Very clear and straightforward. However, right now we have to select our project boards one by one when adding items/tasks to them, which is inefficient.

A Monday.com calendar view as addition to ‘My Work’ linked to all boards (and showing all due dates) would help a lot!
